rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: Sensitive File Exposed on Web Server

rules.rule_text:
title: Sensitive File Exposed on Web Server
id: 76f2b262-e158-4644-aae8-b0de0fcf8854
description: Detects potentially sensitive files downloaded from a web server
status: test
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-05-21
modified: 2026-02-12
logsource:
  category: webserver
detection:
  file_exists:
    status: 200
  file_is_sensitive:
  - cs-uri|contains:
    - .bak
    - .env
    - .sql
    - /.git/
  condition: file_exists and file_is_sensitive
falsepositives:
- Some web servers log status as 200 even if the file doesn't exist. Visit the URL
  to verify
tags:
- attack.initial-access
- attack.t1595
- attack.t1594
level: medium
